comments.author: @elvirajersky5249
comments.text: In all my travels, nothing tops Lebanon. Lebanon 🇱🇧 is the most beautiful country in the world and the people of Lebanon are the most hospitable people I have ever had the pleasure of meeting. A very poor country, but the generosity of Spirit is amazing. Stand outs for me were Beirut, Byblos, Sebhel, Journieh where Our Lady of Harissa is and Bsharri where the Cedars of God is.  Harissa and Bsharri were life changing moments in my life. God, Jesus Yeshua and Our Lady Mother Mary, please bless and always look after beautiful Lebanon and the people of Lebanon. 😇☘️🌟💚💚💚💜💜💜💛💛💛✝️✝️✝️💙💙💙💟💟💟💜💜💜💚💚💚🌟☘️😇

comments.text: Thank you for a good sanitized video of the country. However, what you have miserably failed to do is to show that Lebanon has many religions and subcultures. It seems that your message here is to show it as a mainly Christian nation showing and discussing churches, while Christians are a significant minority or or less. We have Muslims and Druze as well. Head south and show the genocide, destruction, and complete eradication of many villages by Israel and its supporting proxies. All is not clean and well here. This is coming from a Lebanese who is identified as a Christian. More work is needed to show the reality.
